title: HANDANI Optimized
description: This is HANDANI's Optimized Modpack. Includes well-known optimization and convenience mods. Also there is a change in appearance and sound like trailer.
body:
# This is HANDANI's Optimized Modpack. 

I looked at several modpacks, but couldn't find one that I liked, so I made it myself. I combined all known mods by referencing several popular optimization modpacks.

I sorted my resourcepack like this:

![Resource Pack Sort](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/badd74b18d5d8e0f8adcffec3c50383e4b50a648.png)

1. It's Include well-known **optimization** and **convenience** mods for both side of **client and server**.

2. The convenience mods were chosen so that the **default shortcut keys do not overlap each other.** That's why I can't include Traveler's Backpack. :(

3. I also included references to trailer footage. So there is a **change in appearance and sound**.

4. As you know, There is a gap between the trailer video and the actual in-game graphics. So, I added **resource packs** created for the same purpose and mods that modify animations. And I also included mods for more **realistic sounds** for a satisfying sound.

5. I choose **MakeUp - Ultra Fast for shaderpack** because I was judged to use the least amount of system resources among shaders that use ray reflection.
